name: trash
description: Trash, move files/folders to the trash

options.name: -v
options.description: Print verbose output while moving items

options.name: -F
options.description: Use the Finder API to move items to the trash

options.name: -s
options.description: Securely empty the trash. trash asks for confirmation executing this action. If this argument is used, no need to be specified

options.name: -y
options.description: Skips the confirmation prompt for -e and -s. CAUTION: permanently instantly
